title: Repository Bootstrap
body:
Bootstrap the repository structure, project context, roadmap, documentation layout, ADRs, labels, and Foundry protocol workspace.

Status: complete.

title: Access Manager
body:
Implement the ProtocolAccessManager module with OpenZeppelin AccessControl, protocol roles, specification, and Foundry tests.

Status: complete.

title: Identity Layer
body:
Implement the identity layer, including Identity Registry, Trusted Issuers, Claim Topics, and Identity Factory modules.

Status: open.

title: Compliance Engine
body:
Implement the compliance engine, rule engine, country rules, holding rules, investor rules, and module-level tests.

Status: open.

title: ERC-3643 Token
body:
Implement the lightweight ERC-3643 token core using identity and compliance modules for regulated transfer checks.

Status: open.

title: Partition Manager
body:
Implement the ERC-1400 inspired partition manager as an extension module without making partitions the token core.

Status: open.

title: Chainlink CCIP Bridge
body:
Implement the bridge adapter and CCIP receiver for compliant cross-chain RWA transfers.

Status: open.

title: Chainlink ACE Adapter
body:
Implement the Chainlink ACE adapter and connect it to compliance workflows through a stable module interface.

Status: open.

title: Corporate Actions
body:
Implement corporate action modules for issuer-driven lifecycle events such as distributions, redemptions, recalls, splits, and conversions.

Status: open.

title: SDK
body:
Build the SDK for application integrations, typed contract access, and developer workflows.

Status: open.
